characters.description: Port Atwood's concealed representative arrives in New Washington under the name Monk. He hides his standing as the ranker Super Brother Man while navigating a guarded first contact with the rebuilding government.
characters.name: Zac

characters.description: A New Washington cultivator liaison who receives the guarded visitor calling himself Monk. She seeks cooperation and intelligence from Port Atwood.
characters.name: Julia

characters.description: Zac's younger sister, missing since the Integration. Confirming her fate and finding her are central aims in his search for his family.
characters.name: Kenzie

characters.description: A senior New Washington decision-maker who studies the mysterious Monk and weighs how the government should deal with Port Atwood.
characters.name: Thomas Fischer

characters.description: A Greenworth tutorial survivor living in Zac's abandoned apartment. He confirms the cultivator council's violent takeover and the murder of Zac's father.
characters.name: Ryan

characters.description: Zac and Kenzie's father. Ryan's account confirms that Greenworth's returned cultivators murdered him after seizing control of the town.
characters.name: Robert

characters.description: The returned-cultivator leader whose faction seized Greenworth and killed civilian organizers to monopolize control of the town.
characters.name: Tom Sullivan

characters.description: Greenworth's senior government official, who enabled the ruling council's abuses in return for privilege. A former captive kills him after the council falls.
characters.name: Mayor Whitfield

characters.description: A former captive of Greenworth's rulers who asks Zac for a binding contract in exchange for protection and a path to greater strength. She becomes his first contracted recruit.
characters.name: Joanna Anderson

characters.description: A Port Atwood official who reports on local reconnaissance while Ogras remains secluded. Her duties and knowledge place her within the settlement's small leadership circle.
characters.name: Alea

characters.description: The trainer responsible for the Atwood Valkyries' basic combat instruction and cultivation choices.
characters.name: Alan

characters.description: The supreme authority of the neighboring Zhix hive. The Holiness listens to Zac's account of the System and the merged worlds, and demonstrates control over the hive while weighing his claims.
characters.name: Zhix Holiness

characters.description: An adviser to the local Zhix Holiness who is appointed liaison for the tentative peace with Port Atwood.
characters.name: Ibtep

characters.description: A resident of Port Atwood who meets Ibtep when the Zhix liaison visits the settlement.
characters.name: Emily

characters.description: A Port Atwood fighter who joins Zac's effort to evacuate an endangered settlement. His water-based attacks and field experience distinguish him within the growing human contingent.
characters.name: Sap Trang

characters.description: A Thayer Consortium representative whom Zac selects to evaluate valuables and conduct trade at New Washington's auction. He provides Port Atwood with specialist commercial judgment.
characters.name: Calrin

characters.description: Zac's demon ally, emerging from seclusion to join the New Washington delegation. To outsiders he presents himself as the representative of another Earth species rather than as a former invader.
characters.name: Ogras

characters.description: An elite cultivator of the Marshall clan whom New Washington describes as humanity's strongest woman. She arrives amid open suspicion toward Zac's nonhuman companions.
characters.name: Thea Marshall

characters.description: The leader of Billyville, a settlement fighting a rat-man incursion. He seeks outside fighters for the campaign.
characters.name: Billy

characters.description: The leader of a northern settlement who controls a teleporter near the undead incursion.
characters.name: Northern teleporter owner

characters.description: A former film actor who takes over hosting duties during the second half of New Washington's grand auction.
characters.name: Emma McHale

characters.description: Thea Marshall's grandfather and political adviser. He quickly recognizes both Zac's danger and the unusual deference Ogras shows him.
characters.name: Henry Marshall

characters.description: A Port Atwood administrator coordinating preparations for the approaching defense wave. He is adapting ordinary vehicles to run on power derived from Nexus crystals.
characters.name: Adran

characters.description: The unnamed bishop commanding the Church of Everlasting Dao forces outside Port Atwood. A veteran of earlier purification campaigns, he seeks benefits for his church through the special defense contest.
characters.name: Church bishop

characters.description: An elite undead commander leading the force against Port Atwood. It carries a long bone-hook weapon and poses a major threat to the settlement's defenders.
characters.name: Corpse Lord

characters.description: The stone-bodied commander of the black, rock-like army attacking Port Atwood. It turns on Zac as soon as the undead commander abandons the battlefield.
characters.name: Stone-bodied commander

characters.description: A demon illusionist who joins the covert assault on the Church camp. His layered deceptions help hide the infiltrating team and its sniper.
characters.name: Janos

characters.description: A returning stargazer who previously guided Zac and is present again at Port Atwood.
characters.name: Stargazer estate manager

characters.description: The sentient treasure spirit who manages the newly awarded Towers of Myriad Dao. Brazla oversees the repository's skills and inheritance trials.
characters.name: Great Sage Brazla

characters.description: Port Atwood's newly appointed war minister, responsible for its organized military forces. Joanna serves as his second-in-command.
characters.name: Ilvir

characters.description: The northern settlement leader whose teleporter Zac uses after fulfilling the terms imposed for access. Bernard receives the promised antidote and payment.
characters.name: John Bernard

characters.description: A frontier healer whose rare ability to cleanse miasma gives him political protection and lets his clinic sell priority access. Zac seeks him out for an injury that ordinary treatment has failed to cure.
characters.name: Purifier Wang

characters.description: A hypnotist who controls Refugees Harbor through planted suggestions while holding the settlement's children hostage. Ogras finds and kills him, freeing the captives.
characters.name: Lord of Eyes

characters.description: A survivor of Refugees Harbor who identifies herself as Zac's girlfriend after Ogras liberates the controlled settlement and frees its captive children.
characters.name: Hannah

characters.description: A frontier resistance healer who reluctantly carries a rifle because her skills are not suited to combat. She witnesses an unidentified fighter devastate a vast undead horde.
characters.name: Sui

characters.description: The leader of a protected monastery who knows that Zac defeated an undead leader and requests a meeting with him.
characters.name: Monastery abbot

characters.description: Kenzie’s imprisoned friend in Kingsbury. Zac frees her after using Spring Root to verify that she is human, and she chooses to leave with Kenzie.
characters.name: Lila

characters.description: An old friend of Kenzie who was displaced far from Kingsbury during the Integration and later reunited with her. She joins Kenzie and Lila on their move to Port Atwood.
characters.name: Olivia

characters.description: Hannah's surviving tutorial companion, who arrives with her at Port Atwood.
characters.name: David

characters.description: Kenzie's secret in-head assistant. Jeeves warns her of danger, guides her in combat, improves her cultivation and skills, and has upgraded her class.
characters.name: Jeeves

characters.description: An exceptionally equipped human fighter whose identifying details are concealed. He ambushes Zac inside the sealed city and appears comparable to him in combat power.
characters.name: Purple-haired pugilist

characters.description: A level-79 ascended beast confined within the trial city's barrier. Zac must contend with it as part of his sovereignty trial.
characters.name: Star Ox

characters.description: Zac and Kenzie's missing mother. An insignia on her amulet provides a possible link to the technocrats, but that connection remains unconfirmed.
characters.name: Leandra

characters.description: The real man whose identity was used by the shapeshifter accompanying Hannah. He is discovered alive in a hidden basement, gravely tortured and expected to remain unconscious for weeks.
characters.name: David
